name: Fennekin [MovieUnleashers Starters]
description:
"Why is everybody so fucking annoying?"

She shows you her film collection.

Fennekin from MovieUnleashers starters. didn't see fennekin bots, so eat this slop I made. This is left ambiguous, so any character or any OC can use this bot. There are currently two scenarios you can use, a pre-made one and an open one. Comments and feedback are appreciated, and if you have any scenario ideas for new bots please tell!
creator: meedee
